title: Raigo Threatens the Island
description: Enel’s massive thundercloud descends toward the island, forcing everyone to face the full scale of his destruction.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene focuses on Conis, Luffy, Enel, Nami, Aisa. Enel’s massive thundercloud descends toward the island, forcing everyone to face the full scale of his destruction.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: It's right above me... at the top...

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: Shall I show you something quite interesting...?

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: To get up on that ship...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Huh!? Nami? What're you doing here!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I've come to bring you back!

summary: Enel’s massive thundercloud descends toward the island, forcing everyone to face the full scale of his destruction.
